image_requests.prompt: Dramatic cinematic marble bust of Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius, warm amber candlelight illuminating the left cheek and brow in chiaroscuro, deep shadow on right side, serene contemplative downward gaze, laurel wreath visible, dark near-black background with faint wisps of mist, photorealistic fine stone texture, isolated subject, high contrast, museum quality
image_requests.purpose: Hero image: bust fills the right 65% of the frame, amber-lit face is the visual anchor that identifies the subject instantly

html: NEVERPUBLISHED
why: The amber-lit Roman bust occupies the right 65% of the frame — the fastest possible visual signal for 'ancient philosopher' with no text required. 'NEVER' at 155px and 'PUBLISHED' at 86px in Cinzel 900 are sized so both words span approximately the same horizontal width (~550px), creating a stone-inscription quality that directly echoes Roman monumental lettering. Warm gold (#C9A84C) against pure black delivers near-maximum contrast while visually rhyming with the bust's candlelit amber tones, making text and image feel like a single object. At 168×94px thumbnail scale, the Roman silhouette in the right half and the massive 'NEVER' in the left half are the two instant eye-locks — the viewer registers 'forbidden ancient secret' before consciously reading the second word.
title: Marcus Aurelius Guides You to Sleep | The Complete Meditations | 1 Hour Stoic Calm
